expected.notes: Resume and passport candidate names match exactly; rule requires mismatch so it must not fire.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'resume_passport_name_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.resume_passport_candidate_name mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
